ref_classifications.reason: Figure 6.31 appears only inside the reproduced-source credit for this book's Figure 11.13; it refers to Hollas, High Resolution Spectroscopy, not to an internal Silbey figure.

overrides.old: The phase diagram for carbon in Fig. 0.1d shows that graphite and diamond are in equilibrium

overrides.reason: C4 Figure 0.1d is a source/OCR numbering error in the paragraph immediately following Figure 6.1(a-d). The corresponding catalog entry is Figure 6.1, whose caption explicitly says '(a, b) water, (c) carbon dioxide, and (d) carbon'; therefore the intended internal reference is Fig. 6.1d.
